message:
fix(core,pager,wal,vfs): centralize WAL backend installation with page-size validation, owned adapter handoff

Core — Centralized WAL install (connection.rs):
- Added install_opened_wal_backend() that validates the WAL file's
  page size matches the pager's page size before installing, and uses
  set_wal_backend_owned() for clean ownership transfer. Returns
  WalCorrupt on page-size mismatch and properly closes WAL on all
  error paths.
- Refactored install_wal_backend_with_vfs() and
  install_existing_wal_backend_with_vfs() to delegate to the new
  centralized helper.
- Added test for page-size mismatch rejection.

Pager (pager.rs):
- Strengthened WAL recovery to fully parse WAL header and probe for
  page-1 presence, not just check file existence and minimum size.

WAL (wal.rs):
- Added set_wal_backend_owned() accepting adapter by value for
  recoverable error handling.

VFS memory (memory.rs), Harness tests:
- Minor adjustments for API changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
